questions.objective_ref: Explain in plain language what independent verification means and why it requires a source that is separate from the AI.
Distinguish between verification (checking an AI claim against another source) and production (generating the same output yourself from scratch).
Identify at least three methods of verification — cross-referencing a source, applying domain expertise, checking against a known standard, and asking a second person.
Describe what to do when you cannot verify an AI output but Q1 has already told you the cost of being wrong is high.
Apply the Q2 question to a real scenario and record a reasoned answer that feeds directly into A3.
Recognise situations where verification is straightforward, situations where it is difficult, and situations where it is genuinely impossible.
